subject: [AAI] Deploy latest available aai-resources snapshot
commit_message:
[AAI] Deploy latest available aai-resources snapshot

- image contains various dependency updates including spring-boot (2.1 to 2.4)

Issue-ID: AAI-3670
Change-Id: I37e38e71b560594c33a8f1d1d35fbac1fb6191c2
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <Fiete.Ostkamp@telekom.de>
